singine-system.title: Singine System Component Diagram
singine-system.subtitle: Distributed Singine nodes advertise trusted capabilities across laptops, servers, edge devices, and service hosts.

capability-definitions.capability: Execute bounded local actions through explicit policy and operator context.
Expose SQL, SPARQL, and GraphQL access over local indexed knowledge.
Publish health, source coverage, and runtime topology snapshots.
Announce identity, trust assertions, and authentication bootstrap surfaces.
Replicate selected indices or knowledge packs into adjacent trusted nodes.

profile.label: Edge node
profile.summary: Small-footprint Singine running near local sensors, local files, or device-specific runtime state.

component.label: Host substrate
component.summary: OS process boundary, device files, scheduled jobs, and local storage.
component.details: Edge nodes privilege observability and narrow execution over large-scale indexing.
component.interface: Local command execution surface for bounded tasks.

component.label: Singine control plane
component.summary: Policy checks, command routing, and capability advertisement.
component.interface: Advertises node identity and currently enabled capabilities.

component.label: Local adapters
component.summary: Adapters for filesystem state, sensor state, or local application context.
component.details: These adapters translate device-native state into queryable or broadcastable forms.

profile.label: Operator laptop
profile.summary: Interactive Singine workstation for operators, local documents, and bridge inspection.

component.label: Operator shell
component.summary: CLI entrypoint for trusted users running Singine locally.

component.label: Singine core
component.summary: Routes commands, enforces trust decisions, and coordinates local services.

component.label: Knowledge bridge
component.summary: Builds local SQLite, RDF, XML matrix, and multi-query representations.
component.interface: Shared query surface for adjacent trusted nodes.

profile.label: Server node
profile.summary: Persistent Singine service node hosting indexing, API surfaces, and trust coordination.

component.label: Service host
component.summary: Persistent service process, task scheduler, and local durable storage.

component.label: Orchestrator
component.summary: Accepts trusted requests, coordinates job execution, and exposes topology state.
component.interface: Stable ingress for trusted-node control traffic.

component.label: Indexed knowledge plane
component.summary: Maintains bridge databases, RDF packs, and replicated content slices.

component.label: Trust and auth services
component.summary: Manages TOTP bootstrap, trust assertions, and node enrollment metadata.

profile.label: Gateway node
profile.summary: Network-edge Singine node that federates discovery and limits trust propagation.

component.label: Ingress broker
component.summary: Terminates trusted-node traffic and maps it to internal routes.

component.label: Policy guard
component.summary: Applies network trust boundaries before forwarding requests or advertisements.

deployment.label: Trusted Singine mesh
deployment.summary: Trusted nodes instantiate different Singine profiles and continuously advertise what they can safely do for adjacent peers.
deployment.trust-zone: Human-operated devices where Singine starts from local CLI context.
Persistent services that aggregate, index, and govern trusted requests.
Peripheral devices or gateways close to local state and runtime signals.

node.label: Operator laptop
node.summary: Primary authoring and inspection node with local bridge, CLI, and trust bootstrap workflows.

broadcast.cadence: on startup and on topology change

node.broadcast: Advertises local query surfaces and indexed sources.

node.label: Core server
node.summary: Central long-running node that aggregates knowledge, trust metadata, and query interfaces.
node.broadcast: Publishes trust bootstrap and enrollment metadata.
Offers replicated packs and indices to selected peers.

node.label: Gateway appliance
node.summary: Policy-aware ingress and discovery node positioned between edge devices and core services.

node.label: Edge device
node.summary: Localized execution node near raw state, files, or device runtime context.
node.broadcast: Reports local runtime state and enabled adapters.
